name: 100% Wool Tailored Trousers
description: Tailored wool trousers with a clean flat front and a fit built for actual wear, not the runway.
patina: The hem on the left leg has a slight fray from a subway grate in 2022. I never had it repaired. They've softened behind the knee, but the crease still holds. They look like mine now.
whyThisFitsMyArchive: I've worn these to a formal dinner and to a dive bar the same night. The rise sits right without a belt, which is rare at this price. I stopped looking for alternatives.
whatItReplaces: Replaces every pair of 'smart trousers' I bought that looked fine in the shop and wrong on the body — usually because the rise or break was slightly off. These are the first pair where nothing needed adjusting.
whyIChooseThis: Over trend-driven tailoring: this proportion has been correct for decades and still is. Over designer versions: same silhouette, and I can actually afford a second pair when this one wears out.
whatItPairsWithInMyCollection: Worn with battered Salomon trail runners to break the formality. Under the wool coat when it's cold.
layeringCombinations: Not a layering piece by nature, but works under the wool coat in winter without adding bulk at the waist.
colourCombinations: Black is the one I actually own and wear constantly. Grey and navy are the realistic next colours if I need a second pair for the same rotation.
bestSeason: Autumn through spring — wool holds up in heat but isn't the first choice for peak summer
bestOccasions: Anything formal, and deliberately styled down with trail runners for anything that isn't
costPerWearReasoning: ₹8,990 for trousers worn for three years and counting, multiple times a month. That's already under ₹100 a wear and dropping every time I reach for them again.
whatMakesItTimeless: Built on a proportion that works for real bodies, not a fashion trend.
alternativeUnder3000: Zara Slim Fit Trousers (~₹2,990 at zara.com/in) — lighter fabric, same silhouette
alternativeUnder10000: COS Slim Wool Trousers (~₹8,000 import) — cleaner finish
premiumAlternative: Canali Wool Flat-Front Trousers (~₹60,000 import) — Italian tailoring
buyRecommendation: Wait for Sale — significant savings at end-of-season (30-50% off). Worth the wait at ₹4,500-₹6,000.
